title: CleanSpark Q2 2026 Earnings Miss and Market Sentiment Analysis
text: CleanSpark Q2 2026 earnings revealed revenue of $136.4M versus expected $145.4M and EPS loss of $1.52 versus forecasted $0.56 loss, representing a significant miss. The company is facing margin pressures with EBIT margin around -46.7% and profit margin near -53%. Free cash flow burn is approximately -$198.1M during the recent period. Despite headwinds, the balance sheet provides cushion with $458.1M in cash reserves against $1.79B in total debt. Following the earnings announcement, CLSK stock declined approximately 12.76%. The stock initially spiked to $14.34 in intraday trading before fading to close near $12.48. This pattern demonstrates typical post-earnings volatility affecting the stock and presents both risks and opportunities for active traders.
